top_signals.title: India Bond Investors Tap Soaring Swap Rates to Juice Returns
top_signals.summary: Multi-year high swap rates are driving some Indian debt fund managers into trades aimed at boosting fixed-income returns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
